description_long: This is a rectangular table with a broad, flat wooden top finished in a rich, dark brown color, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance. The tabletop has a subtle wood grain texture, suggesting it is made from solid or veneered wood. Supporting the table are four thick, straight legs, each finished in a matte black, likely metal, providing a modern contrast to the wooden surface. The legs are positioned at the corners, offering stability and a clean, geometric silhouette. There are no visible decorative elements, drawers, or additional features, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. This table would be suitable for communal or public use in urban parks, plazas, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A sturdy rectangular table with a dark wooden top and four matte black legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: The table is seen from a wide angle, showcasing the full length of the wooden top and two black legs at the front corners.
description_view_1: The table is viewed from the short end, highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the two front legs.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the opposite long side of the table, again displaying the full tabletop and two legs.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing the opposite short end and the two supporting legs.
